description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs the exact commands `mkdir public` and `find ./ -type f \( -iname *.jpg -o -iname *.png -o -iname *.svg \) -exec cp {} public/ \;`, publishes the `public/` directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
